general.name: mos_target_bhm_csc_parquet
general.description:
Chandra Source Catalogue version 2.0 (CSC2) sources.

Chandra Source Catalogue version 2.0 (CSC2) sources that have been matched (separately) to the PanSTARRS-1 and 2MASS catalogs.  This version of the CSC2 catalog informed early (plate era) SDSS-V observations but was then replaced by updated versions.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_bhm_csc.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.name: pk
pk.description: primary key of this table entry

cxo_name.name: cxo_name
cxo_name.description: unique identifier for the CSC X-ray source

oir_ra.name: oir_ra
oir_ra.description: despite the name, this is the X-ray coordinate of the target

oir_dec.name: oir_dec
oir_dec.description: despite the name, this is the X-ray coordinate of the target

mag_g.name: mag_g
mag_g.description: optical magnitude (g-band) from Pan-STARRS1 catalog, if available

mag_r.name: mag_r
mag_r.description: optical magnitude (r-band) from Pan-STARRS1 catalog, if available

mag_i.name: mag_i
mag_i.description: optical magnitude (i-band) from Pan-STARRS1 catalog, if available

mag_z.name: mag_z
mag_z.description: optical magnitude (z-band) from Pan-STARRS1 catalog, if available

mag_h.name: mag_h
mag_h.description: H-band NIR magnitude from 2MASS catalog, if available

spectrograph.name: spectrograph
spectrograph.description: Which spectrograph this target should be observed with (BOSS or APOGEE)
